title: 2020 USAMO Problems
problem: Let $ABC$ be a fixed acute triangle inscribed in a circle $\omega$ with center $O$ . A variable point $X$ is chosen on minor arc $AB$ of $\omega$ , and segments $CX$ and $AB$ meet at $D$ . Denote by $O_1$ and $O_2$ the circumcenters of triangles $ADX$ and $BDX$ , respectively. Determine all points $X$ for which the area of triangle $OO_1O_2$ is minimized. Solution
